name: Antique
description:
'''Antique''' is a Swedish-Greek musical duo consisting of [[Helena Paparizou]] ({{lang|el|Έλενα Παπαρίζου}}; born 1982) and Nikos Panagiotidis ({{lang|el|Νίκος Παναγιωτίδης}}; born 1978). Formed in [[Gothenburg]] in 1999, the duo combines Greek popular music and lyrics with a Nordic dance-pop sound. 

Both Paparizou and Panagiotidis were born and raised in Sweden by [[Greeks|Greek]] parents. They were the first ever to be nominated for a Swedish [[Grammis]] in the category modern dance with a Greek song. In [[Eurovision Song Contest 2001|2001]], Antique were selected to represent Greece at the [[Eurovision Song Contest]] in [[Copenhagen]] with the song "[[Die for You (Antique song)|Die for You]]", sung in a blend of English and Greek, ending with a third place – only behind Estonia and hosts Denmark. The group is famous in [[Scandinavia]], Greece, Cyprus, Germany and Italy. After 19 years of hiatus the group reunited in March 2022 in Greece releasing a cover hit song from 90's meant to be their comeback in music industry.
